examples.title: Monte Carlo CE Estimation
examples.code:
import numpy as np
samples = 100000
y = np.random.normal(0, 1, samples)
x = y**2 + np.random.randn(samples)
conditional_x = x[y > 2]
print(np.mean(conditional_x))
examples.explanation: Generates joint distribution samples and filters Y>2 cases
